## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Device: [e.g. Pixel 7, iPhone 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- App mode: [Simple / Advanced]
- PWA or browser: [Installed PWA / Browser tab]

## localStorage State (if relevant)
Paste output of `JSON.stringify(localStorage)` from DevTools if the bug involves data.
